name: BlackHoleResearch
description: A Streamlit-based multiwavelength FITS explorer for black hole astrophysics. Loads FITS data from Chandra, XMM-Newton, NuSTAR, ROSAT, JWST (NIRSpec/NIRCam), WISE, 2MASS, VLA, and DSS, renders sky images with WCS overlays and nonlinear stretches, bins X-ray event lists into images, fits descriptive power laws to OGIP PHA spectra, computes Lomb-Scargle periodograms and Vaughan+2003 fractional rms variability, and assembles multi-band Spectral Energy Distributions for classical AGN regimes (NGC 1068, M87, Cyg X-1). Phase 2 adds the JWST Little Red Dot population with L_X/L_UV (Lusso & Risaliti 2016), Balmer-break, and broad-Halpha black-hole-mass diagnostics.
buildInstructions: See README.md — `python3.11 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python scripts/download_data.py && streamlit run app.py`

referencePublication.name: Black holes in binary systems. Observational appearance.
referencePublication.author: Shakura, N. I. & Sunyaev, R. A.

referencePublication.name: On characterizing the variability properties of X-ray light curves from active galaxies
referencePublication.author: Vaughan, S., Edelson, R., Warwick, R. S., Uttley, P.

referencePublication.name: Mid-infrared selection of active galactic nuclei with WISE
referencePublication.author: Stern, D. et al.

referencePublication.name: The tight relation between X-ray and ultraviolet luminosity of quasars
referencePublication.author: Lusso, E. & Risaliti, G.
